title: [LowerMemIntrinsics] Propagate value profile to branch weights
author: mtrofin
description:
If the mem intrinsics have value profile information associated, we can synthesize branch weights when converting them (the intrinsics) to loops.  
  
Issue #147390

comments.author: shiltian
comments.body: This PR causes an undefined symbol error. I'm building with `LLVM_BUILD_LLVM_DYLIB` enabled. The root cause is `LLVMTransformUtils` doesn't depend on `LLVMProfileData`. Do we really want to make `LLVMTransformUtils` depend on `LLVMProfileData`?

comments.author: mtrofin
comments.body: Yes, it's already depending indirectly because it depends on Analysis.
